## Meeting Purpose

[Finalize the date and initial plan for the Lovable/GrowthX workshop.](https://fathom.video/share/W99BSfpxAFokuCmbYPH5CMYH7kfS18dZ?tab=summary&timestamp=4.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Workshop Rescheduled:** Moved from Nov 19 to the week of Dec 8 to accommodate Cecilia's travel.](https://fathom.video/share/W99BSfpxAFokuCmbYPH5CMYH7kfS18dZ?tab=summary&timestamp=4.0)
  - [**Date Options:** Percia to confirm Dec 9 or 11 with Cecilia. Dec 10 is excluded due to GrowthX's client schedule.](https://fathom.video/share/W99BSfpxAFokuCmbYPH5CMYH7kfS18dZ?tab=summary&timestamp=217.0)
  - [**Content Plan:** A remote webinar with Cecilia presenting Lovable product tips, use cases, and examples.](https://fathom.video/share/W99BSfpxAFokuCmbYPH5CMYH7kfS18dZ?tab=summary&timestamp=101.0)
  - [**Promotion:** GrowthX's efforts have already secured \~400 registrations, targeting 1,000+. Lovable will promote to its Discord community.](https://fathom.video/share/W99BSfpxAFokuCmbYPH5CMYH7kfS18dZ?tab=summary&timestamp=276.0)

## Topics

### Workshop Rescheduling

  - [The original Nov 19 date was unworkable due to Cecilia's travel in Europe.](https://fathom.video/share/W99BSfpxAFokuCmbYPH5CMYH7kfS18dZ?tab=summary&timestamp=4.0)
  - [The new target is the week of Dec 8, before holiday breaks.](https://fathom.video/share/W99BSfpxAFokuCmbYPH5CMYH7kfS18dZ?tab=summary&timestamp=159.0)
  - [**Preferred Days (GrowthX):** Tuesday or Thursday.](https://fathom.video/share/W99BSfpxAFokuCmbYPH5CMYH7kfS18dZ?tab=summary&timestamp=222.0)
      - [**Rationale:** These days have historically shown better attendance.](https://fathom.video/share/W99BSfpxAFokuCmbYPH5CMYH7kfS18dZ?tab=summary&timestamp=222.0)
      - [**Constraint:** Wednesday is a primary client day, making Marcel's participation difficult.](https://fathom.video/share/W99BSfpxAFokuCmbYPH5CMYH7kfS18dZ?tab=summary&timestamp=222.0)
  - [**Time:** 9 AM Pacific, chosen for optimal attendance.](https://fathom.video/share/W99BSfpxAFokuCmbYPH5CMYH7kfS18dZ?tab=summary&timestamp=53.0)

### Content & Format

  - [**Format:** Remote webinar, as Cecilia will be in Europe until January.](https://fathom.video/share/W99BSfpxAFokuCmbYPH5CMYH7kfS18dZ?tab=summary&timestamp=145.0)
  - [**Speaker:** Cecilia is essential for the event's energy and product expertise.](https://fathom.video/share/W99BSfpxAFokuCmbYPH5CMYH7kfS18dZ?tab=summary&timestamp=101.0)
  - [**Content Direction:**](https://fathom.video/share/W99BSfpxAFokuCmbYPH5CMYH7kfS18dZ?tab=summary&timestamp=101.0)
      - [Lovable product tips & tricks](https://fathom.video/share/W99BSfpxAFokuCmbYPH5CMYH7kfS18dZ?tab=summary&timestamp=101.0)
      - [Real-world use cases & examples](https://fathom.video/share/W99BSfpxAFokuCmbYPH5CMYH7kfS18dZ?tab=summary&timestamp=101.0)
  - [**Audience:** GrowthX's base of senior marketers interested in AI.](https://fathom.video/share/W99BSfpxAFokuCmbYPH5CMYH7kfS18dZ?tab=summary&timestamp=77.0)

### Promotion & Registration

  - [**GrowthX Promotion:**](https://fathom.video/share/W99BSfpxAFokuCmbYPH5CMYH7kfS18dZ?tab=summary&timestamp=276.0)
      - [Current registrations: \~400 (via Luma and cold email).](https://fathom.video/share/W99BSfpxAFokuCmbYPH5CMYH7kfS18dZ?tab=summary&timestamp=301.0)
      - [Goal: 1,000+ attendees.](https://fathom.video/share/W99BSfpxAFokuCmbYPH5CMYH7kfS18dZ?tab=summary&timestamp=301.0)
  - [**Lovable Promotion:**](https://fathom.video/share/W99BSfpxAFokuCmbYPH5CMYH7kfS18dZ?tab=summary&timestamp=276.0)
      - [Primary channel: Discord community.](https://fathom.video/share/W99BSfpxAFokuCmbYPH5CMYH7kfS18dZ?tab=summary&timestamp=276.0)
      - [Email newsletter is not a current marketing channel.](https://fathom.video/share/W99BSfpxAFokuCmbYPH5CMYH7kfS18dZ?tab=summary&timestamp=276.0)

### Team Structure

  - [**GrowthX:** Noted Lovable's team structure is unclear on LinkedIn.](https://fathom.video/share/W99BSfpxAFokuCmbYPH5CMYH7kfS18dZ?tab=summary&timestamp=381.0)
  - [**Clarification:** Lovable uses a fractional/consulting model for marketing (e.g., Percia, Elena), with Cecilia as a full-time employee.](https://fathom.video/share/W99BSfpxAFokuCmbYPH5CMYH7kfS18dZ?tab=summary&timestamp=381.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Percia:** Confirm the final date (Dec 9 or 11) with Cecilia.](https://fathom.video/share/W99BSfpxAFokuCmbYPH5CMYH7kfS18dZ?tab=summary&timestamp=217.0)
  - [**Jason:**](https://fathom.video/share/W99BSfpxAFokuCmbYPH5CMYH7kfS18dZ?tab=summary&timestamp=329.0)
      - [Share a draft content structure for async feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/W99BSfpxAFokuCmbYPH5CMYH7kfS18dZ?tab=summary&timestamp=369.0)
      - [Update the Luma event page once the date is confirmed.](https://fathom.video/share/W99BSfpxAFokuCmbYPH5CMYH7kfS18dZ?tab=summary&timestamp=433.0)
